# About this fixture

This site is a **fixed content fixture** used by Nectar's CI to smoke-test
Ghost theme compatibility. It is not meant to be a real blog — it carries the
minimum content needed to exercise the templates a typical Ghost theme ships:
post pages, a page, a tag archive, an author archive, and pagination.
